subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh with truth and remindeth mankind on this Day wherein the Nightingale of Iraq doth raise its call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و یذکر الناس فی هذا الیوم الذی فیه ینادی عندلیب العراق بندآء
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @call to action, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world
